chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 1/8: Find a Store
scene: 你刚进商场，在导览屏前找店。（对话链：商场）

turns.en: Excuse me, which floor is Uniqlo on?

turns.cn: 二楼东侧，扶梯上去右转。
turns.en: Second floor, east wing. Up the escalator and turn right.
What about the Apple Store?

turns.cn: 一楼中庭，很大的玻璃门面。
turns.en: First floor, center court. Big glass storefront.
Where are the restrooms?
Next to the escalators on every floor.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 2/8: Try On Clothes
scene: 你在服装店试衣服。（对话链：商场）

turns.en: Need help finding a size?
Do you have this in medium? I'd like to try it on.

turns.cn: 有，试衣间在那边，一次最多三件。
turns.en: Yes. Fitting rooms are over there. Three items max.
The sleeves are a bit long. Can they be altered?

turns.cn: 可以，改衣部在一楼，大概一周。
turns.en: Yes. Alterations on the first floor, about a week.
Okay. I'll take this one for now.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 3/8: Food Court
scene: 中午你们在美食广场吃饭。（对话链：商场）

turns.en: Japanese or pizza?
Japanese. I'm craving ramen.
I'll grab a table. You order.
What do you want to drink?
Iced tea, less sugar.
Okay. Number forty-seven. They'll call when it's ready.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 4/8: Electronics Store
scene: 你在电器店看耳机。（对话链：商场）

turns.en: What kind of headphones are you looking for?

turns.cn: 降噪的，通勤用，预算两百以内。
turns.en: Noise-canceling for commuting. Budget under two hundred.
This model gets great reviews. You can try them on.

turns.cn: 续航多久？能连两个设备吗？
turns.en: How's the battery life? Can it connect to two devices?

turns.cn: 三十小时，支持双设备切换。
turns.en: Thirty hours. Supports switching between two devices.
Nice. I'll take them.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 5/8: Gift Wrapping
scene: 你买了礼物，请柜台包装。（对话链：商场）

turns.en: Could you gift-wrap this?
Sure. Five dollars. Would you like a card?
Yes. Please write Happy Birthday.

turns.cn: 用红色还是蓝色包装纸？
turns.en: Red or blue wrapping paper?
Red, please. Thank you.
Five minutes. Please wait over there.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 6/8: Department Store Sale
scene: 百货公司季末清仓，你问折扣。（对话链：商场）

turns.cn: 这件外套还能再打折吗？
turns.en: Can you do any better on this coat?

turns.cn: 已经打七折了，会员再减百分之五。
turns.en: It's already thirty percent off. Members get another five percent.
I have a membership card.

turns.cn: 请刷一下，折后一百四十七。
turns.en: Please scan it. After discount, one forty-seven.
Card, please. Thank you.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 7/8: Parking Validation
scene: 离开前你在服务台办理停车优惠。（对话链：商场）

turns.cn: 消费满五十可以减停车费对吧？
turns.en: Spending fifty gets parking validation, right?

turns.cn: 对，请出示收据和停车票。
turns.en: Yes. Receipt and parking ticket, please.
Here you go. Parked about three hours.

turns.cn: 盖好了，出场闸机前插票。
turns.en: Stamped. Insert the ticket at the exit gate.
Thank you.

chain.title: A Day at the Shopping Mall

title: Chain 8/8: Return at Mall
scene: 你回到商场退一件不合身的衣服。（对话链：商场）

turns.cn: 想退这件，尺码不对，有小票。
turns.en: I'd like to return this. Wrong size. Here's the receipt.

turns.cn: 吊牌还在吗？三十天内可以退。
turns.en: Are the tags still on? Returns within thirty days.
Yes. Never worn.

turns.cn: 退款回原卡，三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Refund to your original card in three to five business days.
Can I exchange for a larger size?
Sure. I'll grab one.
